title: Community Moderation Update
body:
Today's moderation actions:

• Banned spam_wave_42 for phishing links spam across multiple channels
• Banned toxic_runner for targeted harassment against newcomers
• Warned bot_like_user_77 for suspicious automated behavior
• Warned new_member_17 for off-topic posting
• Protected trusted members from false reports

All reports have been reviewed and resolved. Thank you for helping keep our community safe!
